scroll_found.title: Research the Industrial Thermo scroll at a Research Pedestal

heat_network.title: Build a complete heat network: Nuclear Reactor → Heat Pipes → Fluid Boiler → Steam Engine

subtitle.text: Heat travels. The pipe is the argument. The boiler is the conclusion. The turbine is the proof.

description: CH.10 · INDUSTRIAL THERMO
▸ The Industrial Thermo scroll covers
the heat pipe network system in full.
Heat Pipes are the arteries of the nuclear base.
They carry reactor output to boilers.
They carry boiler output to steam engines.
Build them correctly or lose efficiency at every step.
◈ HEAT PIPE NETWORK
└ CNA Heat Pipes carry thermal energy between blocks
└ Connection rule: Heat Pipes must be adjacent to
both heat source and heat consumer
└ No length limit — pipe across the factory
└ Insulated variants: prevent ambient heat loss
(critical for long runs through cold biomes)
└ Branch splitter: divide heat to multiple boilers
simultaneously (parallel boiler banks)
◈ BOILER OPTIMIZATION
└ Nuclear heat: most efficient boiler fuel source
└ Superheated boiler: outputs 800°C steam (max tier)
└ Stack 2×2 boilers for maximum steam output
└ Steam Engine RPM scales with steam quality
(nuclear steam >> blaze cake steam >> charcoal)
└ Buffer tank between boiler and engine
smooths output during reactor reload cycles
◈ WASTE HEAT APPLICATIONS
└ Excess reactor heat: redirect to heating ovens,
smelters, Blaze Burner equivalent heating
└ Cold Sweat base temp: nuclear heat raises
ambient base temperature (natural insulation)
└ Freeze It & Heat It: use reactor heat pipes to
maintain food storage at optimal temperature
◈ SCROLL: Industrial Thermo
└ Found in Create laboratory structures,
boiler-adjacent dungeon and workshop loot
└ Research time: 30 min
└ Unlocks: heat pipe routing, boiler stack efficiency,
waste heat applications, insulated pipe variants
▸ The Pale Shore gets its name from the heat haze.
The boilers run day and night.
The steam never stops.
The machines never sleep.
The shore is pale because the light never changes.
▶ Find The Industrial Thermo scroll [check]
▶ Build a full heat network from reactor to engine [check]
◇ Insulate your longest pipe runs.
Heat loss over distance is invisible until you
notice the output drop and trace it back 80 blocks.
